THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RONDANINI, LUCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOUIE, PETER DBA PAC HOLDINGS MAKISHEVA, ZARINA $8,529.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,669.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST PETER LOUIE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STATUTORY DAMAGES OF $6,000.00 ARE INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY, WITH CC 1950.5 IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
